chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-364 of 2024 Allauddin Mallick Versus Dr. Abdul Jalil & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order son Misc. 2106/24 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 25.04.2024 Petitioner Allauddin Mallick Advocate present in person. -.-.- A statement has been filed by the petitioner along with an order sheet dated 13.01.2024, which is taken on record. Petitioner present in person submits that the parties have amicable resolved their dispute by way of written compromise and that intent is disclosed in the order sheet referred/identified above. He submits that in view of above he would not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
